mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.0 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that compress corporate earnings expectations and drive negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of months where UNRATE exceeds 8.0, or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth that sustains corporate revenue trajectories, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of quarters, or the interaction term loses predictive power (t-stat < 1.5) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid month-over-month increases in the industrial production index signal immediate capacity utilization improvements that boost short-term equity valuations during post-shock recovery phases.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >65% of recovery-phase months with rising INDPRO, or the mechanism fails to outperform a buy-and-hold baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 0.5 percent indicates extreme monetary accommodation that fuels liquidity-driven equity buying and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of ultra-low rate months, or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for inflation expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and rising unemployment indicates labor market deterioration and wage pressure relief that compresses profit margins, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces positive forward returns in >60% of quarters, or the interaction term is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample forecasts.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts during late-cycle expansions signal cooling consumer leverage and reduced construction activity that precedes earnings downgrades and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Housing starts declines fail to predict negative returns in >50% of late-cycle months, or the signal is subsumed by broader credit cycle indicators.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month declines in the industrial production index reflect immediate output contraction that triggers short-term risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of months with falling INDPRO, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below random chance in walk-forward validation.
